since_last: 24% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.19%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 24% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -2.21% · Gold -1.49% · Nasdaq100 -0.99%. 24% of 85 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.19%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.19%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.48%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SPCX is the standout at -8.75%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +6.20%, VRT +6.07%, AMAT +4.73%, AVGO +4.56%, MRVL +4.50%. Laggards: SPCX -8.75%, SNAP -8.14%, APP -6.42%, NOW -5.39%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -8.75% at $192.9
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -8.75% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
